title: Ginger Steals the Pancakes!
logline: The morning after Episode 1's pancake feast, Mama bakes a fresh stack for Papa (he was working late on goreadling.com again). Ginger climbs the kitchen table and steals the entire plate. Sara turns detective: a trail of syrup paw-prints leads through the house. Where did Ginger hide the pancake hoard?
showFormulaBeat: First episode using the 5-beat detective formula. Pilot (Ep 1) was off-formula.
designConstraint: EVERY sub-clip ≤3 bound characters. Cast rotates between sub-clips. Audience perceives ensemble through cuts.

fiveBeatStructure.label: HOOK_THE_ESCAPE
fiveBeatStructure.summary: AUDIENCE-ONLY: Ginger sneaks into the empty kitchen, climbs onto a chair, then onto the kitchen table. She grabs the entire stack of pancakes (with chocolate syrup) in her mouth and bolts.

subClips.shot: Wide shot, locked camera, empty @KitchenMorning. @Ginger pads in carefully, looks around: "Woof... woof?" (whisper-bark)
Medium shot. @Ginger jumps onto a chair, then onto the kitchen table next to a stack of pancakes with chocolate syrup. @Ginger licks lips: "Woof!"
Low tracking shot at floor level. @Ginger jumps off the table with the entire pancake stack in her mouth, paws printing chocolate syrup as she runs out: "Woof woof!"

fiveBeatStructure.label: DISCOVERY
fiveBeatStructure.summary: Sara, Eva, Mama enter kitchen. Plate is GONE. Sara: 'Wait — I have a plan!' Eva spots syrupy paw prints on the floor.

subClips.shot: Wide shot. @Sara, @Eva, and @Mama walk into @KitchenMorning. @Mama gasps: "The pancakes are gone!"
Close shot. @Sara hands on hips, eyes narrowed in detective focus: "Wait — I have a plan!"
Low shot on @KitchenMorning floor. @Eva crouches pointing at chocolate paw prints: "Really?! Really-really-really chocolate paw prints!"

fiveBeatStructure.label: SEARCH_CLUES
fiveBeatStructure.summary: Sara, Eva, Joe follow paw prints into the living room. Sara reads a syrup smudge on the wall. Joe sniffs the trail.

subClips.shot: Tracking shot across @Livingroom floor. @Sara, @Eva, and @Joe follow chocolate paw prints. @Joe sniffs the floor: "Yip yip!"
Close shot of a chocolate-syrup smudge on the @Livingroom wall, shaped like letters. @Sara reading slowly: "G-I-N-G-E-R was here!"
Two-shot in @Livingroom. @Sara on the LEFT pointing at the smudge: "Six letters!" @Eva on the RIGHT counting on fingers: "One, two, three, four, five, six!"

fiveBeatStructure.label: EUREKA_RESOLUTION
fiveBeatStructure.summary: Trail leads under the bunk bed. Sara discovers Ginger's hoard — pancakes hidden in the trundle drawer! Big Eva reveal moment.

subClips.shot: Wide shot in @BedroomSisters. @Sara on the LEFT, @Eva on the RIGHT, both peer under the bunk bed at chocolate-syrup trail leading to the trundle. @Sara: "Under the bed!"
Medium shot. @Sara opens the trundle drawer. Inside: pancakes everywhere, @Ginger curled on top of them, mouth full. @Eva: "Really?! Really-really-really?!" @Ginger sheepish: "Woof?"
Close shot of @Sara crouched petting @Ginger's head, both syrupy. @Sara: "Next time just ask, okay?" @Ginger licks her cheek: "Woof."

fiveBeatStructure.label: CLIFFHANGER_TAG
fiveBeatStructure.summary: Final shot: Ginger sitting alone, watching the postman walk up the path through the front window. She perks her ears.

subClips.shot: Wide shot of @Livingroom from the side. @Ginger sits center-frame staring out the front window at a postman walking up the path with a package. @Ginger's ears perk: "Woof?" Title card overlay: NEXT TIME — THE POSTMAN MYSTERY

castingMatrix.comment: Every sub-clip ≤3 bound subjects. Counts below verify constraint compliance.

learningMoments.reading: Beat 3 — Sara reads the syrup smudge: 'G-I-N-G-E-R was here'
learningMoments.math: Beat 3c — Eva counts the letters of GINGER on her fingers (1-6)
learningMoments.social_emotional: Beat 4c — Forgiveness: Sara teaches Ginger to ask next time

rules_reference: See /Users/admin1/.claude/projects/-Volumes-Samsung500-goreadling/memory/feedback_saraandeva_sets.md (the foundational doc — 3-character constraint, 23 prompt rules, show formula, all real-family details)
